title: Paatha Kolusu Paattu Lyrics Thirumathi Palanisamy
stanzas: <div>Paatha Kolusu Paattu Lyrics Thirumathi Palanisamy

Paatha kolusu paattu
paadi varum paadi varum.
paava sogusu paarka
kodiperum kodiperum.(2)

siththaada poata
chinna mani thaeru
sillenu pooththa
sevvarali poovu

seppaala senju vachcha
amman silaithaan..

Paatha kolusu paattu
paadi varum paadi varum.
paava sogusu paarka
kodiperum kodiperum

Kuththaala megamellaam
koondhalile neendhi varum
koyaaraa maanganiyayi
kodi idaithaan yendhi varum

maththaappu vaanam ellaam
vaai sirippu kaatti varum.
maanodu meenirandai
mai vizhiyo kootti varum.

ponnaaga jolikkum
pen paavai azhagu
onnaaga kalandha
munnooru nilavu

pottoadu poovum kondu
thaavum mayil thaan.

Paatha kolusu paattu
paadi varum paadi varum.

Senjaanthu kuzhambethudhu
theetti vaitha siththirame.
thenpandi kadal kulithu
kondu vandha muththinamae

thottaalum kai manakkum
then palani santhanamae.
thenkaasi thooralile
kan vizhitha senbagamae.

pennaaga pirandha
pallaakku neeyo
iraezhu ulagil
eedaaga yaaro.

nenjodu koodu katti
koovum kuyilo..

Paatha kolusu paattu
paadi varum paadi varum.

penendra jaathiyile
aayirathil aval oruthi.
pon vairam thoduthaalum
podhaathu seersenathi.

kalyaana pandhathile
naan avalai nearniruthi
poomaalai soottiduven
maappilai naan pattuduthi

andraadam alaindhu
engaeyum thaedi
kandaene enakku
thothaana jodi.

vandhaachu kaala neram
maalaiyida thaan.

Paatha kolusu paattu
paadi varum paadi varum.
paava sogusu paarka
kodiperum kodiperum.

siththaada poata
chinna mani thaeru
sillenu pooththa
sevvarali poovu

seppaala senju vachcha
amman silaithaan..

Paatha kolusu paattu
paadi varum paadi varum.
paava sogusu paarka
kodiperum kodiperum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of nostalgia and longing, reflecting on past memories and emotions.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Thirumathi Palanisamy, the song is a poignant moment that highlights the emotional journey of the characters.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, known for his soulful voice and emotive singing style.

When was the song released?

Paatha Kolusu Paattu was released on October 25, 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Paatha Kolusu Paattu, the listener is taken on a nostalgic journey filled with heartfelt emotions. The song beautifully encapsulates the essence of longing and reminiscence, making it a perfect fit for reflective moments. Its soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke deep feelings, resonating with anyone who has cherished memories. This classic track from Thirumathi Palanisamy remains a beloved piece in Tamil music history.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paatha Kolusu Paattu is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of nostalgia and longing. With the enchanting voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, this song from the classic Thirumathi Palanisamy resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the soothing vibes and heartfelt lyrics that make this track a cherished gem in Tamil music history.
stanzaMeanings: The song of the anklet is coming, the song is coming. The girl looks beautiful, she will be admired.
A small gem has fallen, a flower has bloomed like a red hibiscus.
The goddess has been placed carefully, she is beautiful.
The song of the anklet is coming, the song is coming. The girl looks beautiful, she will be admired.
The clouds gather and come down, like a beautiful mango tree.
The sky shows a smile, the moonlight gathers with the stars.
The beautiful girl shines like a bright moon, blending with the lovely light.
The flower that has fallen is like a peacock.
The song of the anklet is coming, the song is coming.
The boy is playing with the little child, like a sweet melody. The sweet fish from the sea brings pearls.
The honey from the garden is sweet, like the fragrance of the flowers in the breeze.
Born as a girl, who will be the one to take you in this world?
The heart calls out like a cuckoo.
The song of the anklet is coming, the song is coming.
In the world of women, she is one among thousands. Even if you touch her like gold, she won't be easily caught.
In the wedding ceremony, I will tie her with a garland, I will make her my bride.
Searching everywhere, I found my match.
The time has come, it is time to celebrate.
The song of the anklet is coming, the song is coming. The girl looks beautiful, she will be admired.
A small gem has fallen, a flower has bloomed like a red hibiscus.
The goddess has been placed carefully, she is beautiful.
The song of the anklet is coming, the song is coming. The girl looks beautiful, she will be admired.
